mapper.select: SELECT id, template_type, description, result_json, is_pinned, create_time FROM dee_history ORDER BY is_pinned DESC, create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dee_history (template_type, description, result_json, is_pinned, create_time) VALUES (#{templateType}, #{description}, #{resultJson}, #{isPinned}, #{createTime})
